ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the parameter applies */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units in which the parameter is measured */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_parameters_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("conditions") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_parameters_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement specification */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor parameter */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the measurement */,
  "repeatability" TEXT /* Repeatability setting for the measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the measurement */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the measurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement specification */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_specs_repeatability FOREIGN KEY ("repeatability") REFERENCES repeatability_settings ("repeatability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the unit */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repeatability_settings" (
  "repeatability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repeatability setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "repeatability_level" TEXT /* Level of the repeatability setting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repeatability setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repeatability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sensor parameter */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES sensor_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES sensor_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES sensor_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement specification being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specification */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_access_logs_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES measurement_specs ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES sensor_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_manufacturing" (
  "manufacturing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing process */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor version being manufactured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manufacturing process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manufacturing process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the manufacturing process */,
  "manufacturing_process_description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_manufacturing_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES sensor_versions ("version_id")
)
